data.content:
**Diagnosis:** The `GenerateSampleCode` target writes `GeneratedInfo.cs` to disk but never adds it to the `Compile` item group. By the time `CoreCompile` runs, MSBuild doesn't know about the new file.

**Fix:** Add a `<Compile Include>` item for the generated file inside the target.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add the generated file to the compilation so Roslyn sees it -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.reasoningText:
The issue is clear. The `GenerateSampleCode` target runs `BeforeTargets="CoreCompile;BeforeCompile"` and generates the file, but it never adds the generated file to the `Compile` item group. The MSBuild `Compile` items are already resolved by the time the target runs, so the generated file isn't included in compilation.

The fix is to add the generated file to the `Compile` item group within the target, using `<ItemGroup>` with a `<Compile Include="..." />` entry.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add the generated file to the compilation so Roslyn sees it -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

  </Target>", "new_str": "    <Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add the generated file to the compilation so Roslyn sees it -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>"}

    <!-- Add the generated file to the compilation so Roslyn sees it -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.content:
Build succeeds and runs correctly now.

**Root cause:** The `GenerateSampleCode` target wrote `GeneratedInfo.cs` to disk but never added it to the MSBuild `Compile` item group. The compiler had no idea the file existed.

**Fix:** Added an `<ItemGroup><Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" /></ItemGroup>` inside the target so the generated file is included in compilation.
